expected_effect: Reduce prompt token waste by stripping composite signal payloads, removing redundant strategy blocks from narrative entries, and fixing phantom #0065 gene signal coverage
rationale: Three sources of prompt noise identified: (1) composite signals carry stale 200-char payloads that waste tokens without aiding gene selection, (2) narrative entries repeat strategy blocks already visible in Gene Preview (~24 lines wasted), (3) gene_gep_optimize_prompt_and_assets missing high_failure_ratio/force_innovation signals claimed added in cycle #0065 but never persisted (phantom repair)

preconditions: need stricter, auditable evolution protocol outputs
strategy: Extract signals and determine selection rationale via Selector JSON
Prefer reusing existing Gene/Capsule; only create if no match exists
Refactor prompt assembly to embed assets (genes, capsules, parent event)
Reduce noise and ambiguity; enforce strict output schema
Validate by running node index.js run and ensuring no runtime errors
Solidify: record EvolutionEvent, update Gene definitions, create Capsule on success

summary: Reduced prompt noise: stripped composite signal payloads (60-char cap), removed redundant strategy blocks from narrative entries (~24 lines saved), fixed phantom #0065 gene signal coverage (added high_failure_ratio + force_innovation_after_repair_loop to genes.json)
